title: Identify personal AWS LICHEN EBS cache
description: Identify the copied LICHEN Zephyr EBS cache in personal AWS account 210337117346. Verified vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, 400 GiB gp3, available in us-west-2c, created from snap-07fc9c823c5dfdec7, Name=lichen-zephyr-arm64. No AWS resources or tags changed. Stale references remain in AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, scripts/ec2-claude.sh, scripts/ec2-hetero-fleet.sh, scripts/ec2-renode-fleet.sh, scripts/ec2-renode-fleet-simple.sh, and Beads memory; remediation exceeds three files and requires an approved epic.
close_reason: Copied cache found and verified in personal AWS
